Sushil Kumar Tiwari v. Hare Ram Sah & Ors.
government school. The age of the victim appears to be within the 
range of 12-13 years at the relevant point of time. The medical 
report records the age as 15 years. However, we cannot lose sight 
of the fact that the age of the victim was not challenged during 
cross-examination of any of the witnesses mentioned above. Their 
testimonies, on the point of age, have largely remained unrebutted, 
thereby meaning that the Respondent Nos. 1 and 2 had no claim that 
she was not a minor at the relevant point. We do not mean to say in 
cases involving POCSO Act or Juvenile Justice (Care & Protection) 
Act, 2015, the determination of age is not required. Most certainly, 
the determination of minority is essential to extend the protection of
